title: Video: Stay Well This Season | Respiratory Illnesses | CDC

Message 2 
Want to avoid getting sick with a respiratory illness this season? Well, you don’t have to go too far out of your way to prepare and protect yourself. Watch this quick video to learn everyday actions to a healthier season for you and those around you https://bit.ly/4mVji7y 
For older adults and their families 
Message 1 
Respiratory illnesses are on the rise, and the risk of serious illness increases with age, especially after the age of 65. If you, or someone you love, is at higher risk of complications from a respiratory illness, take everyday actions to reduce the risk of getting very sick. Watch this quick video learn how to prepare and protect yourself and those around you https://bit.ly/3UJZnfZ 
Message 2 
If you're 65 or older, respiratory illnesses like flu, COVID-19 and RSV can hit you harder than most. But the good news is you can take simple, everyday actions to protect yourself. Watch this video to learn how to prepare and protect yourself and those around you for a healthier season https://bit.ly/3UJZnfZ 
For people with underlying health conditions 
Message 1
